subject: Human Resources
title: The Role of the EEOC
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on The Role of the EEOC.

hook.text: In 2022, the EEOC received over 73,000 workplace discrimination charges. That's 200 complaints every single day.

buildup.text: The Equal Employment Opportunity Commission enforces federal laws prohibiting workplace discrimination.

discovery.text: It investigates complaints, mediates disputes, files lawsuits, and issues guidance on discrimination and harassment.

twist.text: Most EEOC charges are resolved through mediation or settlement—only a fraction go to court. But the threat shapes behavior.

climax.text: Companies that proactively comply with EEOC guidelines avoid costly investigations and protect their reputation.

punchline.text: The EEOC doesn't just enforce the law. It sets the standard.

quiz.question: What is the EEOC's primary function?
